site.title: Riviera Moretti
site.homeIntro: Riviera Moretti is an independent studio based in Vienna, specialising in art-directed illustrations for concept-driven architecture, competitions, and pitch entries.
site.homeSecondaryText: This version keeps the mood of the original site, but the content now lives in a couple of simple JSON files and a small image folder that can be updated directly on GitHub.
site.worksIntro: A concise, editable list of projects. Add rows, change results, update years, and attach project links without touching the layout.
site.worksNote: Use this page for the public-facing project table. The original mirror remains available as an archive, while this version is easier to maintain.
site.projectsIntro: Replace the four sample images on the home page and edit the rows in the table to keep the site current without touching any Readymag data.
